_meta.name: ALM A2-Tool launch config — 14B A1 merged base + tool-use LoRA (D4 PIVOT retrain 20260417)
_meta.rationale: A1 final ckpt + A2-Orch adapter merged base. A2-Tool LoRA is lighter (r=32). D4 PIVOT (2026-04-17T17:20Z): previous round trained on 50-example × 1500 steps (30 epochs) → catastrophic overfit, hire_sim_lenient regressed 0.5667 vs 0.8111 baseline. This retrain uses mixed corpus (250 tool + 3000 broad = 3250 lines, 4% tool ratio, 3.2MB) with reduced steps (300) + lower LR (2e-6) per D6.post_mortem_constraint_added_20260417 (tool_weight<5%, broad>=3MB, steps/example<=3).
_meta.d4_pivot_note: Expanded corpus to fix D4 overfit regression (2026-04-17 D4 pivot agent)

base.name: Qwen/Qwen2.5-14B-Instruct
base.merge_strategy: sequential_merge — load A1 adapter → merge → load A2-Orch adapter → merge → init fresh tool LoRA

lora.rationale: r32 alpha64 2:1 ratio — lighter than Orch (r64) because tool-use is narrower capability (structured JSON output). Attention-only (no MLP) since tool-call syntax is learned primarily via attention patterns.

training.note: D4 PIVOT: steps 1500→300 (5× fewer, target <=3 effective epochs over 3250 examples @ batch=8), lr 3e-6→2e-6 (lower to protect merged base from generalization collapse), warmup 100→30 (proportional). Previous 1500-step run caused catastrophic overfit (hire_sim 0.5667 vs 0.8111 baseline, 30 epochs × 50 examples). With 3250-example mixed corpus @ batch 8, 300 steps = ~0.74 epoch over full corpus, ≈0.7 gradient updates per tool example — well under the D6 post-mortem cap of ≤3 steps/tool example.

phi_loss.note: B1 ensemble remains ON to preserve consciousness signal during tool-use LoRA. No Orch-OR in tool LoRA — handled by A2-Orch adapter.

corpus.source: training/build_tool_corpus_mixed.hexa (D4 pivot 2026-04-17) — tool_head(125) + broad_head(3000 from corpus_alm_70b.jsonl) + tool_tail(125)
corpus.note: D4 PIVOT mixed corpus. 50 tool seed × 5 copies + 3000 broad koalpaca/kmmlu/kobest/carrotai instructions = 3250 lines / 3.2 MB. Tool byte ratio 4.7% (within 1-5% target). Previous 50-example corpus caused overfit; this dilutes tool-call syntax with broad instruction-following to preserve A1 general capability while reinforcing tool patterns.

hooks.label_routing: production -> R2 permanent upload per ckpt_policy.json

pod.note: SAME pod as A1/A2-Orch — reused sequentially. Total pod timeline: A1 (12h) → A2-Orch (12h) → A2-Tool (6h) = 30h on single H100.

blocks.requires_a1_complete: A1 step_3000 adapter present in local ckpt dir or R2
blocks.requires_a2_orch_complete: A2-Orch step_3000 adapter present (launcher verifies before firing)
